x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Balance Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The block applies to the entire available balance of the account.

Comment:
Example: Legal freeze due to a court order

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Balance Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Only a specific portion of the balance is blocked.

Comment:
Example: €500 blocked on a €2,000 account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Target Amount Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A predefined amount is blocked, regardless of the total balance structure.

Comment:
Example: €100 reserved for a pending transaction

x-enumeration-literals.name: Variable Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The blocked amount can change over time based on updates or conditions.

Comment:
Example: Hotel authorization adjusted after final bill calculation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Segmented Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Funds are blocked in separate portions under different blocks.

Comment:
Example: €300 (card hold) + €700 (loan collateral)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Scope Block
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The extent of the block depends on a condition.

Comment:
Example: Additional funds blocked if transaction exceeds estimate
